## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in the project.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `make check`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` when needed.
- [ ] I tested a generated project when template creation changed.

## Notes

List any follow-up work, compatibility limits, or decisions reviewers should
know about.
